registry_reference.source: Project Steering/MODEL_REGISTRY.md section 1.2 (flagship4b-speedjerk-30k, TanitEval key flagship-30k, step 29999)
registry_reference.note: canary_rollout computes a PLAIN corpus-wide mean over all selected windows -- the methodology-matched comparison is the FULL-SET figure (0.4271), not the 8-split episode-jackknife heldout mean (0.4522, a different statistical construction).

verdict: HARNESS NOT VALIDATED -- does NOT reproduce v1's known number within tolerance. DO NOT proceed to score any v4 checkpoint with this harness until the discrepancy is found and fixed.
